name: Onions Vidalia
recipeIngredient: 1 each Cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions and cut each slice in half.
2. Saute the onion slices in a small amount of butter until crisp.
3. Place the onion slices in a greased baking dish.
4. Combine the soup, half-and-half cream, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the onion slices.
6. Sprinkle the shredded cheese on top of the onions.
7. Arrange the bread slices on top of the mixture.
8. Brush the bread slices with melted butter.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes.
From the Miami Herald. Vidalia onions are preferable, but any large, sweet, mild onion will do.
